---
id: disable-source
title: "Disable source"
description: "Disable a source from syncing. Disabled sources will not be included in scheduled syncs."
sidebar_label: "Disable source"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "post api-method"
info_path: core/api_reference/sercha-core-api
custom_edit_url: null
---

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Disable source"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"post"}
  path={"/sources/{id}/disable"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Disable a source from syncing. Disabled sources will not be included in scheduled syncs.

<Heading
  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
  children={"Request"}
>
</Heading>

  parameters={[{"description":"Source ID","in":"path","name":"id","required":true,"schema":{"type":"string"}}]}

  body={undefined}
>
